DownloadPlugin.MarkInstallationDone{PluginDescriptor{Name:"plugin-descriptor", Kind:"resource", Version:Version{Major:1}, PluginDownloadURL:"https://example.com/plugin-descriptor.tar.gz"}, true} -> {}

RunPackage{ctx, "/project", "$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-plugin-spec/pulumi-resource-plugin-spec", nil} -> {invariantProvider{path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-plugin-spec"}, nil}
GenerateLocalSDK{ctx, ProjectRuntimeInfo{name:"go"}, "/project", invariantProvider{path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-plugin-spec"}} -> {LinkablePackageDescriptor{Path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-plugin-spec/sdk-<nil>"}, nil}
